targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service=~"$service", level=~"$level"} | json | transaction_id=~"$transaction_id" | correlation_id=~"$correlation_id" | session_id=~"$session_id" | event=~"error|nack|job_failed" [$__range]))

sum by (event) (count_over_time({service=~"$service", level=~"$level"} | json | transaction_id=~"$transaction_id" | correlation_id=~"$correlation_id" | session_id=~"$session_id" | domain=~"$domain" | version=~"$version" [1m]))

panels.title: Job failures — what actually failed (expand a row for stack)
panels.description: Every error-level log carrying a job_name (handler catch, queue, on-failed). Shows the failing call (action + HTTP status/url) and error message; expand a row for the full stack. Scope with transaction_id/correlation_id.

targets.expr: {service=~"$service", level="error"} | json | job_name=~".+" | transaction_id=~"$transaction_id" | correlation_id=~"$correlation_id" | line_format `{{printf "%-26s" (.job_name | default "?")}}{{if .action}}  action={{.action}}{{end}}{{if .axios_error_response_status}}  HTTP {{.axios_error_response_status}} {{.axios_error_request_url}}{{end}}{{if .transaction_id}}  txn={{.transaction_id}}{{end}}  ✗ {{.error | default .msg}}`

panels.title: Trace — full timeline (ingress → jobs → egress → error/nack)
panels.description: One line per log event. Filter by correlation_id to see a SINGLE request (incl. its async jobs); transaction_id spans the whole flow. Use `search` for a regex over the raw line.

targets.expr: {service=~"$service", level=~"$level"} |~ "(?i)$search" | json | transaction_id=~"$transaction_id" | correlation_id=~"$correlation_id" | session_id=~"$session_id" | domain=~"$domain" | version=~"$version" | line_format `{{printf "%-5s" (.level | default "info") | upper}} │ {{if .event}}{{printf "%-8s" .event}}{{if .http_method}} {{.http_method}}{{end}}{{if .http_path}} {{.http_path}}{{else if .http_url}} {{.http_url}}{{end}}{{if .target}} → {{.target}}{{end}}{{if .http_status}}  {{.http_status}} · {{.http_duration_ms}}ms{{end}}{{if .action}}  action={{.action}}{{end}}{{if .error_code}}  [{{.error_code}}]{{end}}{{if .error_type}} {{.error_type}}{{end}}{{if .nack_message}} — {{.nack_message}}{{end}}{{if .error}} — {{.error}}{{end}}{{else}}{{.msg | default .message}}{{end}}{{if .correlation_id}}  · req={{.correlation_id}}{{end}}`

panels.title: Log body — full JSON (pretty-printed; expand a row for fields)
panels.description: Raw structured payload, incl. captured request/response bodies (only present when OBS_LOG_BODIES includes ingress). Scope with correlation_id + a tight time range to read one request's req/response.

targets.expr: {service=~"$service", level=~"$level"} |~ "(?i)$search" | json | transaction_id=~"$transaction_id" | correlation_id=~"$correlation_id" | session_id=~"$session_id" | domain=~"$domain" | version=~"$version"
